import io
import string

fn capitalize(_ word: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(word)
  if n == 0
    word
  else
    match string.byte_at(word, 0)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 97 and b <= 122
        let rest = string.substring(word, 1, n)
        "#{string.from_byte(b - 32)}#{rest}"
      else
        word
      end
    when None
      word
    end
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut current = ""
  mut have_any = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        if string.len(current) > 0
          if have_any
            result = "#{result} #{capitalize(current)}"
          else
            result = capitalize(current)
            have_any = true
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(current) > 0
    if have_any
      result = "#{result} #{capitalize(current)}"
    else
      result = capitalize(current)
    end
  end
  result
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  println(process(line))
when None
  println("")
end
